title: Restore prod DB + remove episodes table + enforce Docker volume as source of truth
description: Prod DB was orphaned since 5baa6b1 (Docker Compose migration). Real data sits at /home/exedev/ll/data/ll.db (180KB: 4 songs, 1 video, 90 episodes, 138 song_lines, 5 user_episodes). Container volume ll_ll-data is empty. Plan: (1) copy host DB into volume, (2) remove episodes table (it's just scaffolding - all FKs are episode_number which == id), (3) mark volume external. See /Users/oisin/.claude/plans/i-d-like-you-to-atomic-rainbow.md.
close_reason: Phase 1 (DB restore) done Apr 18. Phase 2 (drop episodes table) re-applied as 88fd877 Apr 20 after ll-qjp fix (direct migrator). Verified on prod: 5 migrations applied, episodes table dropped, 6 user_episodes rows preserved with episode_number. Volume marked external: true. Host DB rename still pending (sandbox blocked; non-blocking since volume is canonical).

title: Replace drizzle-kit CLI in Dockerfile CMD with direct migrator call
description: drizzle-kit migrate CLI silently swallows migration errors — prints success and exits 0 even when migrate() throws. Confirmed with 0004 (FK constraint on dropping episodes). Migration works when invoked via node + drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3/migrator direct import with try/catch. Fix: change Dockerfile CMD from 'pnpm drizzle-kit migrate && pnpm start' to a small .mjs script that imports migrate() and exits non-zero on throw. Then retry the Phase 2 refactor that removes the episodes table.
close_reason: Committed af1bd86 (Apr 20). scripts/migrate.mjs runs migrations via drizzle-orm migrator directly, fails non-zero on error. Verified locally (sad path exits 1 with stack trace) and on prod (deploy log shows 'migrations applied' from new script).

title: Diagnose and fix lyric-reload failures
description: Reload Lyrics on song pages silently reports 'No Spanish subtitles found' for known-good videos like Mil Horas. Root causes: (1) --write-auto-sub omits manual subs, (2) --sub-langs es,es-419 misses es-orig/es-ES/etc, (3) spawnSync return value discarded so all failures look identical. Plan: capture stderr + structured result, widen flags to --write-subs + --write-auto-subs + es.*, surface reason in UI, add diagnostic CLI scripts/fetch-subtitles.ts, unit tests mocking spawnSync. Out of scope: lrclib fallback, cookies/PO-tokens.
close_reason: Committed as 8869296; prod needs DB restore before retesting Mil Horas reload

title: Fix subtitle fetching to support es-419 and VTT format
description: fetchSubtitles requests --sub-lang es and looks for a .es.srt file. Videos with only es-419 auto-generated subtitles (Latin American Spanish, VTT only) return null. Need to request es,es-419 and find whatever file yt-dlp creates (.es.srt, .es.vtt, .es-419.vtt etc).

title: Fix YouTube SRT duplicate cue deduplication in parseSrt
description: YouTube auto-generated SRT has pairs of cues ~10ms apart: a shorter base cue at T and a longer karaoke cue at T+10ms where base text is a prefix. After stripping tags, parseSrt produces duplicate overlapping lyric lines. Need to drop base cues that are a prefix of the next cue within 100ms, keeping the fuller karaoke cue. Also, production DB for Costumbres Argentinas (song_id=9) has old data with raw karaoke tags that must be reloaded after the fix.

title: Migrate frontend from Skeleton Labs to shadcn-svelte
description: The current frontend uses Skeleton Labs which causes slow loads, generic theming, and a rigid component API. We need to replace it with shadcn-svelte, set up proper design tokens (CSS custom properties), and apply the warm editorial aesthetic (Playfair Display + Source Serif 4 fonts, terracotta accent, off-white base).

title: Dockerize the ll app
description: Add Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, mise.toml, .dockerignore, and .env.example to run the app in Docker. Uses adapter-node, SQLite volume at /app/data, mise for pnpm and yt-dlp versions.

title: Split MediaDetailPage into atomic components
description: MediaDetailPage.svelte is a monolith. Split into focused components: FormFeedback, WordList, ReloadButton, WordPopover. MediaDetailPage becomes a layout shell with named snippets. Route pages own coordination state.

title: Add delete button for songs
description: Users need a way to delete songs from the music library. Currently there's no delete action anywhere in the music UI. Add a deleteSong server action on the detail page and a Delete button in MediaDetailPage.
close_reason: Implemented deleteSong action and Delete button in MediaDetailPage

title: Redesign YouTube search form with client-side search and thumbnails
description: The current add-video/music form does search as a full-page POST round-trip with no loading indicator. The candidate list has no thumbnails and uses an awkward two-card layout. Rewrite to: client-side search via /api/youtube-search GET endpoint, loading skeletons, YouTube thumbnails in results, single-card layout, smart URL/query detection, save button gating.

title: Add YouTube videos + migrate songs to yt-dlp subtitles
description: Teachers need non-song Spanish YouTube content in the app. Songs also have timing issues because lrclib.net timing is keyed to audio recordings, not specific YouTube uploads. This adds a /videos content type and migrates songs to use yt-dlp Spanish auto-captions for accurate per-video timing. Spec: .claude/specs/2026-04-14-youtube-videos.md

title: Add YouTube video content type with yt-dlp subtitles
description: Teachers need to add non-song Spanish YouTube videos to the app. Songs are the only YouTube-backed content type today. This adds a parallel /videos feature: add a video by URL, fetch Spanish auto-captions via yt-dlp, parse VTT, translate via DeepL, display time-synced subtitles with word-click vocabulary tracking — identical UX to songs.
close_reason: Implemented YouTube query search with explicit result selection for music/video create flows

value: Don't add hacks or workarounds in Docker/infrastructure setup. Find the clean, proper solution — not the expedient one. If native modules (like better-sqlite3) need compiling, compile them properly in the target stage rather than copying node_modules between stages. Research the proper approach before proposing.

Svelte components: named snippets in Svelte 5 are proper for layout regions (not prop drilling). Each component should own its state. Shared types go in types.ts, not redefined inline. export function in Svelte 5 script exposes methods via bind:this. Don't use $page.data in shared lib components — loosely typed.
